motto: H7/7 — universal file container · zlib payload · portable header · native face disguise · properties-only reveal.

compressor.statement: Stdlib zlib — exact bytes restored on any system; header documents layout and sha256.

portable.statement: Header alone describes magic, layout, decompress steps, and integrity — portable across systems.

disguise.statement: Face format from file-format database — reads as native type; H7/7 only in properties.

family_guard.statement: No H7-on-H7, H7e-on-H7e, or H7s-on-H7s; cross-family packs unwrap one layer first.

adopt.statement: Adopt any file in place when seen; never H7-on-H7; busy files shadow until reboot.

ironclad_take: One amplitude at field layer 1 — exact bytes lossless; disguise never poisons the well.
hostess7_take: H7/7 is every file format — smaller, self-headered, instantly readable from header alone.

h7e.statement: H7e — extractable folder archive (zlib tar). Release + double-click lane; beats bare H7 for shipping trees.

field_tech.statement: Portable Field Tech compression — stdlib H7 lane, no .nexus-state required.

h7s.statement: H7s — any file becomes h7s; properties reveal h7s/1, face identifies as native source type; slice execute faster than full parse.

desktop_condenser.statement: One H7s file for all desktop icons + Final Eye OCR — Hostess 7 instant_execute slices; fast and small.

global_adopt.statement: H7s speedup globally for hot JSON + desktop — KILROY kernel loved; vmlinuz/initrd/.ko never wrapped.
